# Altinity.Cloud Provider

Manage Altinity.Cloud ClickHouse clusters via the Altinity Cloud Manager (ACM) REST API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_version = ">= 1.5.7"
  required_providers {
    altinity = {
      source  = "gorgias/altinity"
      version = ">= 0.1.0"
    }
  }
}

provider "altinity" {
  # The ACM API token. May be omitted here and supplied via the
  # ALTINITYCLOUD_API_TOKEN environment variable instead.
  api_token = var.altinity_api_token

  # api_url defaults to https://acm.altinity.cloud/api and rarely needs setting.
  # api_url = "https://acm.altinity.cloud/api"
}

variable "altinity_api_token" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) ACM API token (X-Auth-Token). Minted in the ACM UI under My Account -> Anywhere API Access. Falls back to the ALTINITYCLOUD_API_TOKEN environment variable when unset.
- `api_url` (String) ACM API base URL. Defaults to https://acm.altinity.cloud/api.
